description_long: This lamp features a compact, cylindrical body with a flat, circular base and a prominent, circular light diffuser at the front. The lamp is encased within a rectangular metal frame that extends above and below the main body, providing both structural support and a modern, industrial aesthetic. The frame appears to be made of dark metal, contrasting with the lighter, possibly frosted, diffuser. The lamp's design is minimalistic, with clean lines and no visible switches or decorative embellishments, emphasizing functionality and durability. The overall form suggests it is intended for mounting or placement in utilitarian urban environments, such as pathways, parks, or building exteriors. The construction and materials indicate weather resistance and suitability for outdoor use.
description: A compact, cylindrical lamp with a circular diffuser, encased in a rectangular metal frame for a modern, industrial look. Designed for outdoor urban environments, it features a minimalistic and durable construction.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular diffuser centered within the rectangular metal frame, with the lamp body and base visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the cylindrical lamp body and the rectangular frame extending above and below.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the lamp and the full rectangular frame, with no visible diffuser.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the lamp's depth and the frame's structure.
